ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Only those DOD agencies specified in the contract may place Transportation requests, and only USTRANSCOM Acquisition may place task orders against the contract..

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
